2238290.name: 150 Floors Demo
2238290.description:
Ascend!

150 Floors is a rogue-lite, tile-based strategy RPG where you can choose to play as 8 different mages. Battle your way through 150 floors filled with many eccentric enemies and meet different characters who may or may not help you on your journey, as you attempt to reach the top floor!

Gameplay

Your adventure takes place in a tower that has 150 floors filled with enemies. Use different magical skills unique to each mage to attack your enemies and defend yourself. Each floor made up of tiles has a durability limit. If you attack an enemy, you're also attacking the tile they occupy as well and it may break, sending the enemy to the previous floor. This same logic applies to your opponents as well. If the tile you occupy breaks, you fall to the previous floor as well. Defeat all monsters on a floor and an elevator appears on the floor, taking you to the next floor.

Story

2 years prior in a distant land, strange creatures spawned from the top of a large tower and began their invasion, killing millions of people and consuming their souls. 8 mages, all afflicted by the sudden invasion of strange creatures, want to rid the land of these creatures for their own personal reasons. The only similarities they share are to reach the 150th floor and conquer it, granting them any wish they desire... Or so the saying goes.

Features

- Choose between 8 mages with their own unique elements!

- Battle over 70+ different enemies, each with their own magic skills!

- Use over 300 different magic skills!

- Become even stronger! Decide between a Pure, Natural and Tainted alignment, as you advance your mage to use stronger magic!
2238290.supported_languages:
英语*, 韩语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
